## Checklist

- [ ] Added to the correct section in `README.md`
- [ ] Followed the table format: `| **Name** | one-line description | [links] |`
- [ ] The link(s) work and point to the canonical source
- [ ] The resource is relevant, maintained, and not already listed
- [ ] Description is a single, neutral line (no marketing fluff)
